purpose: Own the WebGPU line-instance precompute lifecycle for curved line drawing.
invariants: LINE_INSTANCE_BYTE_LENGTH matches the WGSL LineInstance layout.
Compute binding names and locations mirror PRECOMPUTE_LINE_INSTANCES_BINDINGS.
The pass reuses caller-owned attribute buffers and does not create CPU-side per-frame copies.
The render model remains owned by src/modules/Lines/index.ts.
change_protocols: Changing packed instance layout requires checking draw-curve-line-instanced.wgsl and precompute-line-instances.compute.wgsl.
Changing compute bindings requires checking contracts.ts and line-instance-pass.ts together.
